subject: refactor(scripts): extract shared utils into scripts/lib/ modules
body:
Duplicated code across transform-overpass.mjs, geocode-all.mjs, and
reverse-geocode.mjs (province map, amenities, address building, operating
hours, payment methods, loyalty programs) extracted into shared modules.
Also extracted HTTP proxy CONNECT tunnel logic into lib/http.mjs, fixing
reverse-geocode.mjs which used bare fetch() that fails in proxy environments.

Tags: refactor, data, pipeline, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: data-extraction
Semver: patch
